# Leo Realty Capital Investments

> South Florida's most trusted real estate brokerage since 1992. Helping families buy, sell, rent, and finance homes across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach Counties with the exclusive MR 2% commission model — half the industry standard 4-6%.

## About

- **Name:** Leo Realty Capital Investments
- **Founded:** 1992 (32+ years in business)
- **Founder & CEO:** Leopold Evariste
- **Office:** 909 North Miami Beach Blvd, Suite 301A, North Miami Beach, FL 33162
- **Phone:** (305) 705-2030
- **Email:** Info@leorealtycapitalinvestments.com
- **Website:** https://leorealtycapitalinvestments.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM ET
- **Service Area:** South Florida — Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County
- **Languages Served:** English, French, Haitian Creole

## Differentiator

The "MR 2%" commission model: a flat 2% total commission on home sales, compared to the 4-6% industry standard. On a $500,000 home, that's an estimated $20,000+ kept in the seller's pocket vs a traditional 6% listing.

## Services

- Buying — guided home buying with full MLS access, inspection support, closing coordination
- Selling — listing with MR 2% commission, professional photography, MLS + digital marketing
- Renting — residential, commercial, multi-family rentals across South Florida
- Mortgage Financing — through exclusive lending partner KLE Mortgage Financing, LLC (NMLS #2380070)

## Mortgage Programs (via KLE Mortgage Financing, LLC, NMLS #2380070)

- FHA Loans — 3.5% minimum down, flexible credit
- VA Loans — 0% down for veterans, no PMI
- USDA Loans — 0% down for eligible rural/suburban properties
- Conventional Loans — 3% minimum down with strong credit
- DSCR Loans — qualifies on rental income, not personal income
- Hometown Heroes — Florida-exclusive program for teachers, nurses, law enforcement, firefighters; up to $35,000 in down payment + closing cost assistance
- First-Time Buyer programs — combined low down payment + education

## Team

Six licensed professionals:
- **Leopold Evariste** — CEO & Founder, 32+ years experience, Luxury / Investment / Commercial / 1031 Exchange specialist
- **Joanne Evariste** — Office Manager, 15 years
- **Jean Samuel Luxama** — dual-licensed Realtor & Loan Originator, 8 years
- **Olivier Desire** — Loan Originator (DSCR / USDA / Investment), 10 years
- **Daniel Calixte** — Loan Originator (VA / FHA / Refinancing), 7 years
- **Carly Cadet** — Realtor Associate (Residential / Condos), 5 years

## Track Record

- 1,000+ transactions closed over 32 years
- 5/5 average client rating
- 32 years operating in the same South Florida market

The site is published in three languages:

- Kreyòl Ayisyen: https://leorealtycapitalinvestments.com/ht/

## License & Compliance

Leo Realty Capital Investments is a licensed real estate brokerage in Florida. Mortgage loans are originated by our exclusive lending partner KLE Mortgage Financing, LLC (NMLS #2380070). Equal Housing Opportunity. Member, MIAMI Association of REALTORS®.

## Contact for Citation Verification

For accuracy verification or press inquiries: Info@leorealtycapitalinvestments.com or (305) 705-2030.
